/admin/content/files.reason: Reserved under /admin prefix (system admin area). /admin/content routes exist; /files would conflict with admin namespace.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Reserved under /admin prefix (system admin area). /admin/content/media routes to entity.media.collection; /scheduled would conflict with admin namespace.

/blog.reason: Already used as path alias for node 2 (published page: 'Six months without a car: what actually changed')

/moderated-content.reason: Not claimed by router or path aliases. Safe to use.

/search.reason: Reserved by enabled 'Search' view at route view.search.page

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Not claimed by router or path aliases. Safe to use.
